list.name: database
list.label: Database

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT database FROM system.tables WHERE name = 'flows'

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT database FROM system.tables WHERE name = 'flows'

list.name: tenant
list.label: Tenant

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT tenant FROM ${database}.flows ORDER BY tenant

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tenant FROM ${database}.flows ORDER BY tenant

list.name: zone
list.label: Zone

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT zone FROM ${database}.flows ORDER BY zone

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT zone FROM ${database}.flows ORDER BY zone

list.name: exporter
list.label: Exporter

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT if(exporterName != '', exporterName, exporterAddr) AS __text, exporterAddr AS __value FROM ${database}.flows ORDER BY __text

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT if(exporterName != '', exporterName, exporterAddr) AS __text, exporterAddr AS __value FROM ${database}.flows ORDER BY __text

panels.title: Traffic to / from $host
panels.description: The IP details page's Traffic tab and the forensics walkthrough's 'bidirectional mode': inbound vs outbound volume for one host. https://kb.kentik.com/docs/core-details-pages

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time,
       round(sumIf(bytes, NOT (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'))) * 8 / ($__interval_ms / 1000)) AS "in bps",
       round(sumIf(bytes, srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) * 8 / ($__interval_ms / 1000)) AS "out bps"
FROM ${database}.flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host') OR dstAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(exporterAddr IN (${exporter:singlequote}), $exporter) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Unique peers
panels.description: Kentik's primary distributed-source/scanning signal (alert details 'unique source IPs'; attack-hunting walkthrough). A jump in inbound peers = scan/DDoS; outbound = the host scanning or beaconing. https://kb.kentik.com/docs/alert-details

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time,
       uniqExactIf(if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), dstAddr, srcAddr), NOT (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'))) AS "peers in",
       uniqExactIf(if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), dstAddr, srcAddr), srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) AS "peers out"
FROM ${database}.flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host') OR dstAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(exporterAddr IN (${exporter:singlequote}), $exporter) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: TCP flag profile
panels.description: Scan signature per the Data Explorer TCP-flags dimension: SYN-only flows (connection attempts that never established) vs flows that saw an ACK. A SYN-only surge inbound is a port scan; outbound, the host probing others. https://kb.kentik.com/docs/data-explorer

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time,
       countIf(protocol = 6 AND bitAnd(tcpFlags, 2) != 0 AND bitAnd(tcpFlags, 16) = 0) AS "SYN-only flows",
       countIf(protocol = 6 AND bitAnd(tcpFlags, 16) != 0) AS "established flows"
FROM ${database}.flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host') OR dstAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(exporterAddr IN (${exporter:singlequote}), $exporter) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Top peers
panels.description: The traffic-patterns pivot: who this host talks to, labeled with hostname, geo and AS (enrichment columns), with per-direction volume and how many distinct services were touched — many ports against one peer = probing (forensics walkthrough). https://kb.kentik.com/docs/core-details-pages

targets.rawSql:
SELECT replaceOne(toString(if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), dstAddr, srcAddr)), '::ffff:', '') AS "Peer",
       any(ifNull(if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), dstAddrHostname, srcAddrHostname), '')) AS "Hostname",
       if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), if(dstCountry = '', 'unknown', dstCountry), if(srcCountry = '', 'unknown', srcCountry)) AS "Country",
       if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), concat(toString(dstAs), ': ', ifNull(dstAsOrg, 'unknown')), concat(toString(srcAs), ': ', ifNull(srcAsOrg, 'unknown'))) AS "AS",
       sumIf(bytes, NOT (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'))) AS "Bytes in",
       sumIf(bytes, srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) AS "Bytes out",
       count() AS "Flows",
       uniqExact(dstPort) AS "Ports touched"
FROM ${database}.flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host') OR dstAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(exporterAddr IN (${exporter:singlequote}), $exporter)
GROUP BY "Peer", "Country", "AS" ORDER BY "Bytes in" + "Bytes out" DESC LIMIT $limit

panels.title: Top services
panels.description: The source-services alert tab: which protocols/ports carry this host's traffic, and how many peers share each — single-port concentration across many peers is the DDoS/abuse fingerprint. https://kb.kentik.com/docs/alert-details

targets.rawSql:
SELECT concat(transform(protocol, [1, 2, 6, 17, 41, 47, 50, 51, 58, 89, 132], ['ICMP', 'IGMP', 'TCP', 'UDP', 'IPv6', 'GRE', 'ESP', 'AH', 'IPv6-ICMP', 'OSPFIGP', 'SCTP'], concat('proto-', toString(protocol))), '/', toString(dstPort)) AS "Service",
       count() AS "Flows",
       sum(bytes) AS "Bytes",
       uniqExact(if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), dstAddr, srcAddr)) AS "Unique peers"
FROM ${database}.flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host') OR dstAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(exporterAddr IN (${exporter:singlequote}), $exporter)
GROUP BY "Service" ORDER BY "Bytes" DESC LIMIT $limit

panels.title: Packet size distribution
panels.description: The packet-size alert tab: uniform small packets across high flow counts betray floods and botnets; legitimate traffic spreads. https://kb.kentik.com/docs/alert-details

targets.rawSql:
SELECT if(intDiv(bytes, if(packets = 0, 1, packets)) >= 1500, '1500+ B',
       concat(toString(intDiv(intDiv(bytes, if(packets = 0, 1, packets)), 100) * 100), '-',
       toString(intDiv(intDiv(bytes, if(packets = 0, 1, packets)), 100) * 100 + 99), ' B')) AS "Avg packet size",
       count() AS "Flows",
       sum(packets) AS "Packets",
       sum(bytes) AS "Bytes"
FROM ${database}.flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host') OR dstAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(exporterAddr IN (${exporter:singlequote}), $exporter)
GROUP BY "Avg packet size" ORDER BY min(intDiv(bytes, if(packets = 0, 1, packets)))

panels.title: Peer countries
panels.description: The source-countries alert tab, via riptide's GeoIP columns: countries ranked by unique peers and volume — geo anomalies flag distributed attacks. https://kb.kentik.com/docs/alert-details

targets.rawSql:
SELECT if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), if(dstCountry = '', 'unknown', dstCountry), if(srcCountry = '', 'unknown', srcCountry)) AS "Country",
       uniqExact(if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), dstAddr, srcAddr)) AS "Unique peers",
       count() AS "Flows",
       sum(bytes) AS "Bytes"
FROM ${database}.flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host') OR dstAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(exporterAddr IN (${exporter:singlequote}), $exporter)
GROUP BY "Country" ORDER BY "Bytes" DESC LIMIT $limit

panels.title: Peer ASes
panels.description: The top-ASes table from Botnet & Threat Analysis, minus the threat feed: which networks this host exchanges traffic with. https://kb.kentik.com/docs/botnet-threat-analysis

targets.rawSql:
SELECT if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), concat(toString(dstAs), ': ', ifNull(dstAsOrg, 'unknown')), concat(toString(srcAs), ': ', ifNull(srcAsOrg, 'unknown'))) AS "AS",
       uniqExact(if(srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host'), dstAddr, srcAddr)) AS "Unique peers",
       count() AS "Flows",
       sum(bytes) AS "Bytes"
FROM ${database}.flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (srcAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host') OR dstAddr = toIPv6OrNull('$host')) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(exporterAddr IN (${exporter:singlequote}), $exporter)
GROUP BY "AS" ORDER BY "Bytes" DESC LIMIT $limit
